sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّالِبُ وَلِيدٌ يَتَأَخَّرُ عَنِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Učenik Velid je uvijek kasnio u školu.
sentences.translationEn: The student Walid was always late for school.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَهُ الْمُعَلِّمُ بِالنَّوْمِ مُبَكِّرًا وَالاسْتِيقَاظِ مُبَكِّرًا.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik ga je savjetovao da ide rano na spavanje i rano ustaje.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher advised him to sleep early and wake up early.

sentences.translation: Velid je isprobao savjet i njegov se život promijenio.
sentences.translationEn: Walid tried the advice and his life changed.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ يَصِلُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Postao je prvi koji dolazi u školu svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: He became the first to arrive at school every day.
